prestazioni: Engine: Full built Hyundai Theta II 2.0T (G4KF engine code) with forged internals including Manley forged pistons (87.5mm, 9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate for 32psi peak boost on E85 fuel.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (OS G32-2WL) with 2.685 final drive ratio, upgraded with PTT 300M axles and a Spec Stage 4+ twin-disc clutch (240mm) with billet flywheel for the 6-speed manual transmission (M6CF3).

Suspension & Braking: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Genesis Coupe-specific valving) with 8kg/mm front and 10kg/mm rear springs, paired with Cusco front strut bar (Type RS) and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm). StopTech Trophy BBK (380mm front, 355mm rear) with DBA 5000 Series rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Genesis Coupe-specific) with carbon fiber front splitter, overfenders (35mm wider front, 50mm wider rear), and duckbill rear wing (200mm chord). Underbody aero includes a custom carbon diffuser with 3D-printed vortex generators.

Exterior: Full Respray in Hyundai 'Phantom Black' (code: 9P) with 3M Matte Black vinyl overlay on the roof and mirrors. Lightweight carbon fiber hood (Seibon CF hood, 8.5kg weight reduction) with custom heat extractors and LED DRLs integrated into the lower bumper (Lux H8 V4).

Interior: Bride Zeta III (Genesis Coupe-specific) reclining bucket seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, wrapped in Alcantara (Autofiber Trimmings). Custom rear seat delete with carbon fiber panel (Seibon) and bolt-in roll cage (Custom Cages 8-point chromoly, TIG-welded).
